scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present && node -e "['./dist', './build', './out', './public', './apps/desktop/dist', './apps/website/dist', './apps/website/build', './apps/website/out', './apps/website/public', './apps/website/apps/desktop/dist'].forEach(p => { try { fs.mkdirSync(p, {recursive: true}); fs.cpSync('apps/desktop/dist', p, {recursive: true}); } catch(e){} }); try { fs.cpSync('vercel.json', 'apps/website/vercel.json'); } catch(e){}"
